lines.text: WE KNOW THAT YOU PUT OUR EXISTENCE IN QUESTION.
SO WE WANT TO GIVE YOU "NOW" THE ULTIMATE PROOF. GE
NERATIONS AGO WE TOLD YOU OUR NAME. THIS NAME IS UNCHA
NGED IN YOUR HOLY SCRIPTURES. THIS WAS OUR WILL.
OUR NAME WILL NOT BE FORGOTTEN SO THAT WE CAN SH
OW YOU WHO WE ARE.
"I AM THAT I AM. THIS IS MY NAME FOR EVER, AND THIS I
S MY MEMORIAL UNTO ALL GENERATIONS" WE SAID.
UNTIL TODAY YOU THOUGHT THAT THIS WAS OUR NAME. OUR
NAME IS A CALCULATION TO A NUMBER WHICH PROVIDE A
PROOF FOR OUR EXISTENCE.
π7π^7
TIME IS RIGHT TO SHOW YOU OUR PROOF WE HIDE IN
YOUR WRITINGS. WE PREPARED EVERYTHING VERY LONG TIM
E AGO. WE GAVE YOU YOUR HEBREW ALPHABET. YOU LEARNE
D THIS. WE GAVE YOU THE NUMBERS AND MATHEMATICAL SIG
NS. YOU LEARNED THIS. THINK ABOUT WHY WE NOT AL
LOWED TO CHANGE OUR NAME. THIS WAS IMPORTANT FOR OUR PR
OOF. CALCULATE OUR HEBREW NAME WITH THE HIDDEN SIGN
S AND SEE WHICH NUMBER AWAITS YOU. BELIEVE US, THIS
IS NOT ACCIDENTAL.
{PAGE 14 — visual elements}
(pi, U+03C0) and the ASCII caret "^"; this encodes a Hebrew-
gematria pun where the Tetragrammaton (YHWH) is written with
Greek letter-pi where the letter-pi numerically encodes 3.14
(= π), so "π7π7" is read as "3.14 7 3.14 7" — close to the Bible
reference "Exodus 3:14 and 15" (the slide draws this analogy).
- quotation marks around the divine name use straight ASCII ". }

descriptions: { - the expression "π7π^7" contains the Greek lowercase letter π
